title: C sharp
text: Home * Programming * Languages * C# C# has been developed by Microsoft as part of the .NET Framework . It is a Multi-paradigm programming language , being functional , imperative , generic , object-oriented , and component-oriented . C# Chief Architect is Anders Hejlsberg , the creator of Turbo Pascal and Delphi [1] .
